zh.Lahaye Aubree Normandy France: 法國諾門迪拉 海也-奧布雷
zh.La Haye, Cotentin, Normandy: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利拉 海也
zh.Compton, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可康普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William I de Haya於大約1100年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利拉 海也時，他的父親Sir Robert de la Haye17歲，母親Muriel Lincoln17歲。他於大約1134年與Julianna de Soules在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1170年在英國薩默塞特登斯特享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William I de Haya于大约1100年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利拉 海也时，他的父亲Sir Robert de la Haye17岁，母亲Muriel Lincoln17岁。他于大约1134年与Julianna de Soules在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1170年在英国薩默塞特登斯特享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haya
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Carlos, Jaime, Juan, Luis, Miguel, Enrique, Jesus, Jorge, Manuel, Mario.

variants.name: Maia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Julio, Alberto, Carlos, Hermilio, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Raul, Ronaldo, Ana, Armando.  Italian Antonio, Filippo, Giusto, Luciano.
Basque: habitational name from Maia (official Basque name: Amaiur; in Castilian: Maya) in the Baztan/Baztán valley in Navarre. Compare   Maya  .
Portuguese: habitational name from any of several places called Maia, especially one in Porto.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William I de Haya was born about 1100, in La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Sir Robert de la Haye, was 17 and his mother, Muriel Lincoln, was 17. He married Julianna de Soules about 1134, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1170, in Dunster, Somerset, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William I de Haya est né environ 1100, à La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Sir Robert de la Haye, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Muriel Lincoln, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Julianna de Soules environ 1134, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1170, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William I de Haya um 1100 in La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de la Haye 17 und seine Mutter Muriel Lincoln 17. Er hat um 1134 in Frankreich Julianna de Soules geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William I de Haya è nato il circa 1100 nel La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Robert de la Haye, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Muriel Lincoln, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Julianna de Soules circa 1134, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1170, nel Dunster, Somerset, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William I de Hayaが約1100年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメラ ヘイで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de la Hayeは17歳，母Muriel Lincolnは17歳であった。約1134年にフランスでJulianna de Soulesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1170年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William I de Haya(이)가 대략 1100년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 라 헤예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de la Haye(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel Lincoln(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1134년 프랑스에서 Julianna de Soules(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1170년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William I de Haya nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Robert de la Haye, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Muriel Lincoln, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Julianna de Soules aproximadamente 1134, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1170, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William I de Haya родился около 1100 г. в местности ла хеи, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de la Haye было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel Lincoln, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Julianna de Soules около 1134 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1170 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William I de Haya nació aproximadamente 1100, en La Haye, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Robert de la Haye, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Muriel Lincoln, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Julianna de Soules aproximadamente 1134, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1170, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
